revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-2-230

Armature (in an electromagnetic horn)

That part of the magnetic circuit which is free to move under the action of the magnetic field and whose motion is imparted to the diaphragm.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Electromagnetic horn - Armature}}
